backlog.title: Fix all ruff lint errors across codebase
backlog.description: Fix all 132 ruff lint errors (E, F, I, UP, B rules) across the entire codebase using ruff check --fix and manual fixes where needed.
tasks: Run ruff check --fix . to auto-fix import sorting and formatting
Fix remaining errors that cannot be auto-fixed
Verify ruff check . passes with 0 errors
Run full test suite to ensure nothing broke

backlog.title: Make ConversationStore Thread Safe
backlog.description: ConversationStore sử dụng shared mutable state (`_mem`, `_dirty`, `_summary`) nhưng chưa có cơ chế đồng bộ khi nhiều request chạy đồng thời.
backlog.note: reset after daemon restart — previous run was interrupted

backlog.title: Fix Execution Runtime Set Comparison
backlog.description: Trong execution_runtime.py, hàm so sánh kết quả execution với expected đang dùng toán tử `==` để so sánh set. Cần thay bằng `set1 <= set2` hoặc `set1.issubset(set2)` vì thứ tự phần tử không quan trọng. Sau khi sửa, chạy pytest và benchmark để verify.
tasks: Kiểm tra toàn bộ logic compare

backlog.title: Make Execution Runtime Thread Safe
backlog.description: Shared state trong ThreadPoolExecutor chưa đảm bảo thread-safe.
tasks: Thay mutable object bằng immutable copy khi phù hợp

backlog.title: Refactor execute()
backlog.description: `execute()` quá lớn, khó bảo trì.

backlog.title: Refactor create_app()
backlog.description: `create_app()` đang đảm nhận quá nhiều trách nhiệm.

backlog.title: Optimize Evidence Serialization
backlog.description: Không serialize toàn bộ evidence lớn lên frontend.
tasks: Chỉ gửi full payload khi cần

backlog.title: Improve Safe Data Serialization
backlog.description: `_safe_data()` chưa xử lý tốt dữ liệu lồng nhau.
tasks: Hỗ trợ object không JSON serializable
acceptance_criteria: Không lỗi khi serialize object phức tạp

backlog.title: Add EvidencePlanner Fallback
backlog.description: Intent không có template sẽ không thu thập evidence.

backlog.title: Make Conversation Summary Threshold Configurable
backlog.description: Make the conversation summary threshold configurable instead of being hardcoded. Replace the current hardcoded value of 4 turns with a configurable setting, read from configuration (default 6-8 turns), and add tests to verify the configuration is respected.

backlog.title: Make Frontend Port Configurable
backlog.description: Make the frontend port configurable instead of being hardcoded. Remove the hardcoded port 5173, read the port from environment variable, implement fallback logic if the port is busy, and ensure the application starts correctly on the configured port.

backlog.title: Remove Dead Code
backlog.description: Remove all dead code from the codebase to improve maintainability. Identify and delete unused wrappers, redundant helpers, obsolete code, and duplicate utility functions across the project. Ensure no functionality is broken after removal.

backlog.title: Standardize Naming Convention
backlog.description: Standardize naming conventions across the entire project for consistency. Normalize methods using `_get_*`, `_read_*`, and `_load_*` prefixes, ensure naming patterns are consistent across all modules, and update all references to match the standardized naming.

backlog.title: Cache Repeated /proc Reads
backlog.description: Cache repeated reads from the /proc filesystem to reduce I/O overhead. Avoid reading /proc multiple times within the same request by implementing a caching layer, and add benchmarks to verify performance improvement.
tasks: Tránh đọc nhiều lần trong cùng request

backlog.title: Hide Internal Error Details
backlog.description: Hide internal error details from API responses to prevent information leakage. Stop returning implementation details, available source information, and internal paths in error responses. Log the full error details server-side while returning only generic error messages to clients. Standardize the error response format.
acceptance_criteria: Log vẫn đầy đủ để debug

backlog.title: Move Docker Secrets Out of Repository
backlog.description: Không lưu plaintext secret trong repository.
tasks: Kiểm tra toàn bộ Docker secrets
Chuyển secret sang Docker Secrets hoặc env local
Cập nhật tài liệu cài đặt
acceptance_criteria: Repository không còn chứa secret thật
Có file example để developer cấu hình

backlog.title: Add API Authentication (Platform)
backlog.description: Chuẩn bị API authentication cho production.

backlog.title: Make SSH Host Key Checking Configurable
backlog.description: Cho phép bật/tắt StrictHostKeyChecking bằng cấu hình.
tasks: Giữ Local MVP mặc định như hiện tại

backlog.title: Prevent SSRF
backlog.description: Ngăn InternetTool truy cập private network.

backlog.title: Sanitize Error Messages
backlog.description: Sanitize error messages to prevent leaking sensitive information. Ensure stacktraces, internal paths, and available source information are not returned to clients. Standardize error response format across all endpoints.

backlog.title: Validate Uploaded Files
backlog.description: Validate uploaded files to prevent security vulnerabilities. Implement restrictions on file extensions, enforce file size limits, validate filenames for malicious patterns, reject path traversal attempts, and add unit tests for all validation logic.

backlog.title: Prevent Path Traversal
backlog.description: Prevent path traversal attacks in file operations. Resolve all paths to absolute paths, verify they remain within the allowed directory, reject symbolic link escapes, and add regression tests to ensure protection is maintained.

backlog.title: Mask Sensitive Information in Logs
backlog.description: Mask sensitive information in log output to prevent credential leakage. Implement masking for passwords, tokens, API keys, DSN strings, and Authorization headers before they are written to logs.

backlog.title: Remove Global Mutable Secret State
backlog.description: Không lưu token trong global mutable variable.

backlog.title: Add Rate Limiting (Platform)
backlog.description: Add rate limiting middleware for the platform deployment. Configure requests per minute limits, implement different rate limits per endpoint, log rejected requests for monitoring, and document the rate limiting configuration.

backlog.title: Limit Upload Size
backlog.description: Limit upload size to prevent resource exhaustion. Implement a MAX_UPLOAD_SIZE configuration, return HTTP 413 (Payload Too Large) when the limit is exceeded, and document the upload size limit.

backlog.title: Restrict Local File Access
backlog.description: Restrict local file access to only allow reading files within a designated document root directory. Resolve paths to absolute form, reject any path that attempts to escape the document root, and add tests to verify the restriction.
tasks: Chỉ cho phép đọc trong document root

backlog.title: Hide Database Credentials
backlog.description: Hide database credentials in logs to prevent credential leakage. Do not log full DSN strings, mask username and password portions, only log host and database name for debugging purposes.

backlog.title: Validate Session ID
backlog.description: Validate session IDs to prevent injection attacks. Validate session ID format and length, reject invalid characters and traversal strings (such as '../'), and ensure only properly formatted session IDs are accepted.

backlog.title: Make Secret Path Configurable
backlog.description: Make the secrets path configurable via environment variable. Add an ORION_SECRETS_PATH configuration option, support custom secret file locations, and document the configuration so users can place secrets outside the repository.

backlog.title: Improve Database Connection Security
backlog.description: Improve database connection security by implementing connection pooling, adding SSL support for remote database connections, making SSL mode configurable, and updating documentation to reflect the security options.

backlog.title: Security Regression Tests
backlog.description: Create security regression tests to ensure security fixes remain intact. Implement tests for upload attacks, path traversal, SSRF prevention, secret masking, and platform authentication to verify security measures continue to work.
acceptance_criteria: Toàn bộ security regression test pass

backlog.title: Fix Docker Build Dependencies
backlog.description: Đảm bảo Docker image luôn build thành công, không phụ thuộc cấu hình local.
acceptance_criteria: Docker build thành công từ repository sạch

backlog.title: Build Docker Images In CI
backlog.description: CI phải build được toàn bộ Docker image.

backlog.title: Start Containers During CI
backlog.description: Start Docker containers during CI to verify they run correctly. Implement docker compose up in CI pipeline, wait for all services to be ready, run smoke tests to verify functionality, then tear down containers with docker compose down.
acceptance_criteria: CI xác nhận container chạy được

backlog.title: Add Health Endpoint
backlog.description: Thêm endpoint kiểm tra trạng thái service.

backlog.title: Add Docker Health Checks
backlog.description: Add Docker health checks to container definitions for proper orchestration. Implement health checks for the API service, Redis, and RAG service, and configure compose depends_on with health conditions.

backlog.title: Publish Coverage Report
backlog.description: Publish coverage reports from CI to track test coverage. Run pytest with --cov to generate XML and HTML coverage reports, and upload them as CI artifacts for review.

backlog.title: Add Security Scan
backlog.description: Add security scanning to CI pipeline. Integrate Bandit for static analysis, Safety for dependency vulnerability scanning, pip audit for package vulnerabilities, and fail the CI build if critical issues are found.

backlog.title: Configure Dependabot
backlog.description: Configure Dependabot for automated dependency updates. Set up Dependabot to monitor Python dependencies, Docker images, and GitHub Actions for updates on a weekly schedule.

backlog.title: Graceful Shutdown
backlog.description: Implement graceful shutdown for the application server. Handle SIGTERM and SIGINT signals properly, close the database connection pool, and cleanly shut down all tools and resources to prevent data loss.

backlog.title: Add UI Test Stage
backlog.description: Add a UI test stage to the CI pipeline. Run npm ci to install frontend dependencies, execute npm test for unit/integration tests, upload test results as artifacts, and fail the CI build if any tests fail.

backlog.title: Improve Logging
backlog.description: Improve logging across the application. Implement structured logging, make log levels configurable, add request IDs for tracing, and add correlation IDs to track requests across services.

backlog.title: Improve Monitoring
backlog.description: Improve monitoring capabilities. Add a metrics endpoint, expose Prometheus metrics, create a Grafana dashboard, and define alert rules for system health monitoring.

backlog.title: Resource Limits (Platform)
backlog.description: Set resource limits for platform deployment containers. Configure CPU limits, memory limits, and container reservations, and document the resource requirements.

backlog.title: Deployment Pipeline (Platform)
backlog.description: Create a deployment pipeline for the platform. Build release images, push to container registry, deploy to the server, verify deployment success, and implement a rollback strategy.

backlog.title: Release Automation
backlog.description: Automate the release process. Tag releases with version numbers, generate changelogs, publish build artifacts, and create release notes for each release.

backlog.title: CI Performance Optimization
backlog.description: Optimize CI pipeline performance. Cache pip and npm dependencies across runs, parallelize CI jobs where possible, and reduce overall workflow execution time.

backlog.title: Standardize Development Environment
backlog.description: Standardize the development environment setup. Update the bootstrap script, verify virtual environment creation works correctly, ensure dependency installation succeeds, and verify the local startup process.

backlog.title: DevOps Documentation
backlog.description: Create comprehensive DevOps documentation covering the CI pipeline, Docker workflow, local development setup, and release workflow to help developers understand the infrastructure.

backlog.title: Increase Backend API Test Coverage
backlog.description: Backend API hiện có ít integration test, chưa bao phủ đầy đủ endpoint mới.
acceptance_criteria: Tất cả endpoint chính đều có integration test
Không có endpoint mới thiếu test

backlog.title: Create Shared Pytest Fixtures
backlog.description: Tập trung toàn bộ fixture dùng chung vào `conftest.py`.

backlog.title: Convert Benchmark To Dataset
backlog.description: Không hardcode benchmark trong Python.
tasks: Tách benchmark logic khỏi dữ liệu

backlog.title: Regression Tests For Runtime Bugs
backlog.description: Create regression tests for previously fixed runtime bugs. Add tests for set comparison in execution_runtime, capability resolver behavior, evidence merging logic, and execution graph processing to prevent regressions.

backlog.title: Thread Safety Tests
backlog.description: Create thread safety tests for concurrent components. Test multi-threaded access to ConversationStore, Execution Runtime, and Tool execution, and verify deterministic output under concurrent load.

backlog.title: Serialization Tests
backlog.description: Create serialization tests for the safe data serializer. Test with nested dictionaries, nested lists, custom objects, large payloads, and circular references to ensure robust serialization.

backlog.title: Upload Validation Tests
backlog.description: Create upload validation tests for file upload functionality. Test with invalid file extensions, oversized files, path traversal attempts, empty files, and duplicate filenames.

backlog.title: Internet Tool Tests
backlog.description: Create tests for the Internet Tool covering network failure scenarios. Test invalid URLs, timeouts, DNS failures, retry logic, and blocked address handling.

backlog.title: Knowledge Tool Tests
backlog.description: Create tests for the Knowledge Tool covering capability management. Test capability lookup, evidence mapping, missing capability handling, duplicate capability detection, and invalid request handling.

backlog.title: Capability Library Tests
backlog.description: Create tests for the Capability Library covering registry operations. Test registry validation, duplicate detection, unknown capability handling, serialization, and loading from storage.

backlog.title: Improve Benchmark Reports
backlog.description: Improve benchmark reports to provide better visibility. Aggregate benchmark results, display scores, show pass rates, and show execution times in an easy-to-read format.

backlog.title: Performance Benchmarks
backlog.description: Create performance benchmarks for key system operations. Benchmark agent startup time, query latency, tool execution latency, memory usage, and CPU usage to track performance over time.

backlog.title: Memory Leak Tests
backlog.description: Create memory leak tests to detect resource leaks. Test long conversation sessions, repeated execution cycles, tool lifecycle management, and cache lifecycle to ensure no memory leaks occur.

backlog.title: Load Tests
backlog.description: Create load tests to verify system behavior under concurrent usage. Test with 10 concurrent users, 50 concurrent users, 100 requests in quick succession, and long-running sessions.

backlog.title: Test Coverage Improvement
backlog.description: Improve overall test coverage across the codebase. Set target coverage goals, ensure no new modules lack tests, integrate coverage reporting in CI, and track coverage by module.
tasks: Không có module mới thiếu test

backlog.title: Remove Duplicate Tests
backlog.description: Remove duplicate tests to reduce test maintenance burden. Find test cases that overlap, merge duplicate tests, standardize test naming conventions, and reorganize test folder structure.

backlog.title: Improve Test Documentation
backlog.description: Improve test documentation to help developers write better tests. Create guidelines for writing tests, mocking dependencies, running benchmarks, and maintaining regression tests.

backlog.title: Continuous Quality Monitoring
backlog.description: Implement continuous quality monitoring. Track benchmark results over time, monitor test coverage trends, track performance metrics, and watch for regressions across releases.

backlog.title: Create ADR-0002
backlog.description: Tạo ADR mô tả quyết định chỉ sử dụng LLM cho Assessment Layer.

backlog.title: Create ADR-0003
backlog.description: Tạo ADR mô tả KnowledgeTool là entry point duy nhất.

backlog.title: Synchronize Architecture Decisions
backlog.description: Synchronize all architecture decision records (ADRs) to ensure consistency. Check all ADR references across documentation, update cross-references between ADRs, fix broken links, and standardize ADR numbering.
tasks: Kiểm tra toàn bộ ADR reference

backlog.title: Rewrite BACKLOG.md
backlog.description: Chuẩn hóa backlog theo format thống nhất.

backlog.title: Release CHANGELOG v0.1.0
backlog.description: Create the initial CHANGELOG for release v0.1.0. Move items from Unreleased section to the first release, follow Keep a Changelog format, and synchronize version numbers across the project.

backlog.title: Expand CONTRIBUTING.md
backlog.description: Expand CONTRIBUTING.md with detailed contribution guidelines. Document branch strategy, commit message conventions, pull request workflow, code review checklist, and development workflow.

backlog.title: Improve SECURITY.md
backlog.description: Improve SECURITY.md with comprehensive security policies. Document the security reporting process, responsible disclosure policy, contact information for security issues, and security response SLA.

backlog.title: Create Security Issue Template
backlog.description: Create issue templates for better issue tracking. Add templates for security issues, vulnerability reports, bug reports, and feature requests to standardize submissions.

backlog.title: Add Last Updated Metadata
backlog.description: Add 'Last Updated' metadata to all key documentation files. Update the Vision document, Roadmap, Project State, Architecture documentation, and Development Rules with last-updated timestamps.

backlog.title: Consolidate Benchmark Reports
backlog.description: Consolidate benchmark reports into a single structured format. Merge multiple benchmark reports, keep only the latest results, create a summary view, and archive old benchmark data.

backlog.title: Standardize Documentation Structure
backlog.description: Standardize documentation structure across all project docs. Normalize heading levels, numbering schemes, table formats, and terminology usage for consistency.

backlog.title: Improve Project Bootstrap Guide
backlog.description: Improve the project bootstrap guide to help new developers get started quickly. Document local setup steps, Python environment setup, Docker setup instructions, and common troubleshooting solutions.

backlog.title: Update Development Rules
backlog.description: Update development rules documentation. Document coding conventions, code review checklists, testing requirements, and documentation standards for all contributors.

backlog.title: Update Project State
backlog.description: Update the project state document to reflect current implementation status. Synchronize the implementation status with actual progress, update the roadmap, list completed work, and document known issues.

backlog.title: Improve Tool Documentation
backlog.description: Improve documentation for all tools in the system. Create or update docs for the Linux Tool, Zabbix Tool, Grafana Tool, Internet Tool, and Knowledge Tool with usage examples and configuration details.

backlog.title: Improve API Documentation
backlog.description: Improve API documentation for all endpoints. Add endpoint descriptions, request examples with curl commands, response examples, and error code documentation for better developer experience.

backlog.title: Improve Architecture Diagrams
backlog.description: Improve architecture diagrams to visualize the system design. Create pipeline diagrams, runtime execution flow diagrams, tool interaction diagrams, component architecture diagrams, and sequence diagrams for key workflows.

backlog.title: Documentation Consistency Review
backlog.description: Perform a comprehensive documentation consistency review. Check terminology usage across all docs, find and remove duplicate content, fix broken links, identify outdated documentation, and synchronize all documentation.
tasks: Đồng bộ toàn bộ tài liệu

backlog.title: Replace Broad Exception Handling
backlog.description: Giảm việc sử dụng `except Exception:` để tránh che giấu lỗi.
acceptance_criteria: Không còn `except Exception:` không cần thiết.

backlog.title: Introduce Database Connection Pool
backlog.description: Không tạo connection mới cho mỗi request.
tasks: Refactor toàn bộ nơi mở DB

backlog.title: Remove Duplicate Tool Execution Logic
backlog.description: Các Tool đang có nhiều đoạn execute giống nhau.

backlog.title: Standardize Tool Interface
backlog.description: Standardize the Tool interface across all tool implementations. Normalize input parameters, output formats, error handling patterns, and metadata structure for consistent tool behavior.

backlog.title: Remove Hardcoded Configuration
backlog.description: Remove hardcoded configuration values and move them to a config file. Extract hardcoded timeouts, retry counts, ports, file paths, cache sizes, and thresholds into the configuration system.

backlog.title: Standardize Configuration System
backlog.description: Standardize the configuration system across the project. Audit all current configuration locations, consolidate into a single configuration source, eliminate duplicate config entries, and document all configuration options.

backlog.title: Improve Logging Consistency
backlog.description: Improve logging consistency across the codebase. Standardize logger initialization, normalize log level usage, unify message format, and ensure structured logging is used consistently.

backlog.title: Improve Error Handling Strategy
backlog.description: Improve the error handling strategy across the project. Standardize the exception hierarchy, normalize error codes, create consistent API error responses, and unify internal error handling patterns.

backlog.title: Improve Runtime Performance
backlog.description: Improve runtime performance by profiling and optimizing bottlenecks. Profile the execution runtime to identify slow spots, eliminate bottlenecks, add appropriate caching, and re-benchmark to verify improvements.

backlog.title: Refactor Capability Resolution Flow
backlog.description: Refactor the capability resolution flow to simplify logic. Review the capability resolution pipeline, simplify the logic flow, remove duplicate lookups, and improve overall maintainability.

backlog.title: Standardize Response Models
backlog.description: Standardize response models across all API endpoints. Normalize response schemas, serialization patterns, validation logic, and typing to ensure consistent API responses.

backlog.title: Improve Type Hints
backlog.description: Improve type hints across the codebase. Add missing type annotations, use TypedDict for dictionary types, use Protocol for structural typing, use Generic for generic types, and ensure all functions have return type annotations.

backlog.title: Remove Legacy Compatibility Code
backlog.description: Remove legacy compatibility code that is no longer needed. Find and remove compatibility layers for deprecated APIs, clean up unused imports, and remove obsolete helper functions.
tasks: Xóa compatibility layer không còn dùng

backlog.title: Standardize Project Structure
backlog.description: Standardize the project structure for better organization. Review the folder structure, move modules to appropriate locations if needed, synchronize package organization, and remove unnecessary modules.

backlog.title: Review Technical Debt
backlog.description: Review and catalog technical debt across the codebase. Search for TODO, FIXME, and XXX comments, categorize each item, and create a plan to address them systematically.

backlog.title: Remove Duplicate Utility Functions
backlog.description: Remove duplicate utility functions across the project. Identify functions that serve the same purpose, consolidate them into a common module, refactor all call sites to use the shared implementation, and delete the old code.

backlog.title: Standardize Project Coding Style
backlog.description: Standardize the project's coding style across all files. Normalize naming conventions, import ordering, code formatting, docstring style, and comment conventions to ensure consistent code style.

backlog.title: Final Architecture Cleanup
backlog.description: Thực hiện đợt cleanup cuối sau khi toàn bộ backlog đã hoàn thành.

backlog.title: Fix Thread Safety in ExecutionRuntime shared state
backlog.description: ExecutionRuntime uses shared mutable state (completed, collected_evidence) accessed from ThreadPoolExecutor callbacks without synchronization.
tasks: Add threading.Lock to protect shared state
Verify with ruff format, ruff check, and full test suite
acceptance_criteria: No race condition on completed/collected_evidence sets

completed.title: Move Docker Secrets Out of Repository
Publish coverage reports from CI to track test coverage
Add security scanning to CI pipeline

workflow: 1. Đọc backlog, pick task P0 cao nhất
2. Phân tích yêu cầu — đọc docs, hiểu task
3. Đọc code liên quan — hiểu kiến trúc
6. Self review — check code, check architecture
8. Lint — ruff check, fix nếu fail
9. Unit test — chạy pytest, fix nếu fail
10. Integration test — chạy all tests, fix nếu fail
11. Regression test — chạy full suite, fix nếu fail
12. Nếu có lỗi → quay lại bước 5, loop đến khi pass hết
16. Mở task tiếp theo — quay lại bước 1
